spec_match.rationale: Correctly demonstrates how to reuse a single Translator session across multiple sequentially translated strings to minimize model-loading overhead.

interactive.rationale: Provides an excellent, engaging interactive dashboard with individual string statuses, progress bars, and detailed elapsed-time statistics.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Accurately explains the performance differences between initial model-load latency and subsequent quick inference calls.

edge_cases.rationale: Features detailed local simulated translation arrays for multiple languages to support robust fallback experiences.

references.rationale: Includes direct references to the ChromeStatus entry and developer docs.

design_system.rationale: Leverages standard table and grid elements styled carefully with design system tokens.

summary: A top-tier interactive concept demo showing the real-world performance benefits of reusing a single Translator session to translate multiple UI strings. Features a detailed row-by-row progress table, actual/simulated timings, and language selection.
